backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor file serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features for client registration flow, including routes, UI components, form fields, and navigation updates with associated test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files describing components, pages, routing, styling, and UI-only portal implementations with dummy state management.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode CSS variables for the design system including custom color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, tentang-partner, internal-portal, partner-portal, and client-register pages wrapped in a shared Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/Closing.tsx: Simple centered section component displaying a closing statement about service quality.
frontend/src/components/ConversionStatem: Centered section component explaining the service unit conversion approach with two-line statement.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with Asistenku icon, copyright text, and navigation links to Concierge WhatsApp, Internal Portal, and Partner Portal.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menu, smooth scroll for Layanan link, and routing to client-register and internal-portal pages.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Two-column hero section with two-line heading, description paragraphs, CTA buttons (Pilih Layanan with smooth scroll, Ngobrol dulu WhatsApp link), and hero image.
frontend/src/components/HowWeSupport.tsx: Centered section displaying a four-step process explaining how Asistenku supports clients with a closing statement.
frontend/src/components/JoinTeam.tsx: Centered section inviting users to join the Asistenku team with a button linking to the partner information page.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCards.tsx: Displays four service tier cards (TENANG, RAPI, FOKUS, JAGA) with pricing and descriptions in an accordion layout. Each card shows emoji, title, short description, price, service units, and expandable full description with a CTA button.
frontend/src/components/TimelyDelivery.t: Simple centered section component displaying a heading and description about timely delivery and parallel work execution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP integration, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for future backend query hooks; currently no backend integration is implemented.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes and Asistenku brand colors (teal and navy). Includes utility classes for brand colors and smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx: Client registration form page with fields for name, email, WhatsApp, and optional company. Form fields are disabled until user logs in via Internet Identity button.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page component that composes multiple sections: Hero, HowWeSupport, TimelyDelivery, ConversionStatement, ServiceCards, JoinTeam, and Closing.
frontend/src/pages/InternalPortal.tsx: Internal portal page with Internet Identity login, dashboard access, staff registration form, and admin/superadmin claim functionality. All actions are gated behind login state.
frontend/src/pages/PartnerPortal.tsx: Partner portal page with Internet Identity login button, a partner dashboard card, and a partner registration form with fields for name, email, WhatsApp, and city. All form inputs and buttons are disabled until the user logs in via the mock login toggle.
frontend/src/pages/TentangPartner.tsx: Placeholder page component for the 'Tentang Partner' route with minimal container styling and no content yet.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls to an element by its ID using the native scrollIntoView API.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space (including teal and navy brand colors), extended theme with sidebar, chart, and semantic color tokens, custom animations for accordions, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing Asistenku landing page with UI-only implementation, brand color scheme (teal/navy), responsive design, accordion interactions, smooth scrolling, and three brand assets. Includes architectural notes and existing features list with requirement IDs.
